name: Tomato Purée
intro: This is a thin purée of tomatoes used in many curries for flavour and colour. Here are two ways you can make it.
method: Simply mix the ingredients together to form a thinner paste. This recipe can be easily scaled up or down: just use 1 part tomato paste to 3 parts water.
Blend the plum tomatoes to make a smooth purée. If you want a deeper red colour, add in a little concentrated tomato paste.
tips: You could also use sieved, unseasoned Italian passata.
